title: neogaillonia olivieri
intro: Neogaillonia olivieri, also known as Chinese gallnut or Gallnut of China, is a plant native to China and India, belonging to the family Anacardiaceae. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its gallnut, which contains gallic acid, tannins, and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Neogaillonia olivieri include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antibacterial properties. Herbal preparations of Neogaillonia olivieri include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, but it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
